name: wxcode/admin-cobalt-projects
title: Cobalt Projects Admin
description: Focused project and work-management admin dashboard — light mode with cobalt-blue accent, left sidebar project list, topbar search and view switch, 4 KPI cards, a compact gantt-style timeline strip, a My Tasks table, and a Team/Milestones side panel.

query.en: Build me a focused project management admin dashboard — left sidebar with project list, topbar with search and view switcher, 4 KPI cards (active projects, tasks due, completion rate, overdue), a compact gantt timeline, a My Tasks table with priority and status pills, and a team milestones side panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a focused project management admin dashboard — left sidebar with project list, topbar with search and view switcher, 4 KPI cards (active projects, tasks due, completion rate, overdue), a compact gantt timeline, a My Tasks table with priority and status pills, and a team milestones side panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
